Video.summary: Watch Martha make chicken soup, minestrone, and spinach cream soup.
Video.title: Soups

Video.summary: Martha shares her love of houseplants. Learn all about the most popular and sought after houseplants, topiaries and begonias and how to take care of them.
Video.title: Amazing Houseplants

Video.summary: Succulents are known for their interesting textures. Martha explores how best to care for succulents including watering, fertilizing, and repotting.
Video.title: The World of Succulents

Video.summary: Martha visits the annual Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden, with a mesmerizing array of orchids designed by acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.
Video.title: The Incredible World of Orchids

Video.summary: With over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her tips for raising and caring for her flock of chickens. Then, learn the how-to of building a chicken coop.
Video.title: Hens and Chicks

Video.summary: One of the joys of gardening is having beautiful color all year. Bulbs and tubers are at the center of the show because of their beautiful blooms from spring to winter.
Video.title: Color For All Seasons

Video.summary: Martha is in the test kitchen with English chef, restaurateur, and author Jamie Oliver, and they're cooking up a mouth-watering menu of dishes that are easy to make.
Video.title: One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver

Image.alt: One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver
One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver
One Pot Wonders With Jamie Oliver

Video.summary: Martha and her friend Monica create a Vietnamese feast.
Video.title: Vietnamese Cuisine

Video.summary: Martha makes sweet and savory apple recipes
Video.title: Sweet and Savory Apple Dishes

Video.summary: Martha prepares Arabian-inspired crowd favorites: chicken kabsa, stuffed cabbage with spiced lamb chops, orzo risotto with wild mushrooms, and orange-ginger yogurt cakes
Video.title: Entertaining for a Crowd

Video.summary: Grain recipes inspired by Arabian cuisine: traditional savory porridge, kamut and roasted vegetables, mixed-grain pilaf with chicken, and herbed barley salad with dates
Video.title: Cooking with Grains

Video.summary: Martha presents the versatility of dates in savory and sweet dishes: date-stuffed baby eggplant, mackerel with date butter, chocolate-date pudding cake, and date truffles
Video.title: Dates

Video.summary: Martha presents the local catch along the Persian Gulf coast: shrimp balls, chilled mussel salad, calamari with vermicelli, lemon, and herbs. Plus, fish with tamarind sauce
Video.title: Coastal Favorites

Video.summary: Martha prepares vegetables.
Video.title: Vegetables

Video.summary: Martha serves up a delicious chicken dinner with fresh ingredients from her greenhouse; joined by her good friend Kevin Sharkey, they celebrate the perfect meal for a taste of home-cooked goodness.
Video.title: Perfect Chicken Dinner

Video.summary: Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.
Video.title: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Image.alt: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden
Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden

Video.summary: Everything is coming up roses on Martha's Bedford farm; join Martha while she plants a new garden with almost 200 roses.
Video.title: Everything's Coming Up Roses

Video.summary: Martha's woodland gardens, including her azalea grove, burst with the last flowers of spring. Everything you need to know about hostas. Plus, bird watching.
Video.title: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds

Video.summary: Peek inside Martha's gardens past and present! Martha visits her former home, Turkey Hill; then back to her home in Bedford for a garden club tour.
Video.title: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Image.alt: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford
Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford

Video.summary: Martha serves up delicious homemade pizzas alongside friends and pizza chefs Christian Petroni and Dean Medico; featuring classic pizzas, signature sauces, and more.
Video.title: Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas

Image.alt: Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas
Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas
Pizza Perfection: Sicilian and Neapolitan-Style Pizzas

Video.summary: Martha visits the Japanese restaurant Joji in the heart of New York, where Chef George Ruan shares his secrets for the ultimate omakase experience; culinary giant Daniel Boulud stops by.
Video.title: Japanese Cuisine: Sushi, Sashimi and More

Image.alt: Japanese Cuisine: Sushi, Sashimi and More
Japanese Cuisine: Sushi, Sashimi and More
Japanese Cuisine: Sushi, Sashimi and More

Video.summary: Martha starts off brunch with a citrus cocktail Mary's knees; Chef Ignacio Mattos joins and makes an omelette with caviar and creme fraiche; Martha makes an endive salad; Martha makes waffles.
Video.title: Brunch Favorites

Video.summary: Martha journeys through her local area in search of the ultimate fresh-baked croissants and sourdough bread; learning about homemade bread and pastries.
Video.title: How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread

Image.alt: How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread
How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread
How to Make Croissants and Sourdough Bread

Video.summary: Martha and her niece Sophie visit their favorite tea shop, Arogya, in Westport, Conn., to discover the do's and don'ts of making tea; they return to Martha's kitchen to create dishes with tea.
Video.title: Martha Throws a Tea Party

Video.summary: Martha visits Mast Market in Mt. Kisco, N.Y., and learns the art behind making their renowned chocolate; from roasting cacao, to stone grinding, to forming delicious bars and chips.
Video.title: Martha and the Chocolate Factory

Video.summary: Hannah Heimbuch and Martha demonstrate how to prepare fish for cooking; Chef Marcus Samuelsson makes cured king salmon and halibut en papillote; Martha breaks down a Dungeness crab.
Video.title: Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday

Image.alt: Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday
Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday
Today's Catch: Fish Recipes for Everyday

Video.summary: Martha shows you how steaming can be one of the fastest and healthiest ways to cook.
Video.title: Steaming

Video.summary: Martha demonstrates that roasting is an adaptable technique for meat, fish, chicken, and vegetables.
Video.title: Roasting

Video.summary: Martha demonstrates healthful and versatile poached chicken breasts.
Video.title: Poaching

Video.summary: Martha shares techniques for roasts: prime rib, crown roast of pork, and stuffed turkey breast.
Video.title: Perfect Roast

Video.summary: Martha blanches, steams, and roasts vegetables to enhance flavor and retain nutritional properties.
Video.title: Vegetables

Video.summary: Martha shows the versatility of seeds by using them in three recipes: seeded English muffins, seeded Saratoga torte, and light and crispy whole-grain seeded wafer crackers
Video.title: Seeded

Video.summary: Martha shares three iconic Latin American cookie recipes: cinnamon-sugar polvorones de canela, bite-sized casadinhos, and champurradas (made with sesame seeds)
Video.title: Latin American Cookies

Video.summary: Martha shows how to properly plant trees including measuring, fertilizing, and watering; how to start trees from seedlings. Plus, Martha's new maze.
Video.title: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Image.alt: Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees
Martha's Amazing Maze; How to Grow Trees

Video.summary: Martha spotlights conifers, the cone-bearing evergreen trees. Take a tour of Martha's Christmas tree farm; learn how to properly move an established tree.
Video.title: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Image.alt: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers
Everything You Need To Know About Conifers

Video.summary: Martha's vegetable greenhouse allows her to harvest a year-round bounty. Then, how to collect, store, and sow seeds. Plus, Martha makes her green drink.
Video.title: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse

Video.summary: Martha shares treasured Eastern European cookie recipes: a family favorite of Martha's, chrusciki, feather-light goose feet, jam-filled kolache, and spiced pryaniki
Video.title: Eastern European Cookies

Video.summary: Martha prepares three Italian cookie favorites: chestnut-filled baci di dama alle castagne, Tuscan cantucci, and hazelnut and chocolate cookies (brutti ma buoni)
Video.title: Italian Cookies

Video.summary: Seat Cover, Paint Tools Good Thing, City Bakery (Field Trip)
Video.title: City Bakery (Field Trip), Seat Cover

Video.summary: Espresso, Scissors Good Thing, Planting Trees
Video.title: Espresso, Planting Trees

Video.summary: Button Tacks Good Thing, Seed Starting, Fruit Muffins, Forcing Branches
Video.title: Seed Starting, Fruit Muffins, Forced Branches

Image.alt: Seed Starting, Fruit Muffins, Forced Branches
Seed Starting, Fruit Muffins, Forced Branches
Seed Starting, Fruit Muffins, Forced Branches

Video.summary: Spring Gardening: Clivia, Spring Cleaning the Garden, Building a Cold Frame
Video.title: Spring Gardening: Clivia, Cold Frame

Video.summary: Summer Gardening: Propagating Tomatoes, Beekeeping, Planting Tomatoes
Video.title: Planting and Propagating Tomatoes, Beekeeping

Video.summary: Italian Vegetable Soup, Fresh Seed Test Good Thing, Planting Edible Peas, Cookie of the Week: Madeleines
Video.title: Italian Vegetable Soup, Madeleines
